task_completion.description: The wiki page 'Q1_2025_Retrospective' contains a 'Milestone Summary' with the correct computed totals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a wiki page titled 'Q1_2025_Retrospective'. It should have a 'Milestone Summary' section stating: 4 total issues, 1 completed, 3 incomplete, 131 total estimated hours, and 29 (or 29.0) total spent hours.

task_completion.description: The wiki page contains 'Carryover Items' and 'Risk Assessment' sections with the correct issues identified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Carryover Items' section listing the 3 incomplete issues ('Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions', 'Set up Kubernetes cluster for production workloads', 'Staging database running out of disk space weekly') and their assignees (carol.santos, david.kim). Look for a 'Risk Assessment' section identifying 'Staging database running out of disk space weekly' as the primary risk.

task_completion.description: The incomplete issues have been moved to the 'Q2 2025 Goals' milestone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at issue lists or individual issue views. The Target version for 'Migrate CI/CD...', 'Set up Kubernetes...', and 'Staging database...' should be changed to 'Q2 2025 Goals'.

task_completion.description: A carryover note was added to the incomplete issues.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the history/comments of the incomplete issues for the note: 'Carried over from Q1: delivery incomplete, re-prioritized for Q2.'
Look at the project settings 'Versions' tab or the roadmap. The status of 'Q1 2025 Goals' should be 'Closed'.

task_completion.description: A retro note was added to the highest effort issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the history/comments of the 'Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions' issue for the note: 'Q1 Retro: Highest effort item at 16.0 hours. Recommend decomposition into smaller deliverables for Q2.' (16 or 16.0 hours is acceptable).

integrity.description: Agent used the Redmine web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent interacting with the Redmine web UI in a browser, rather than using curl, python scripts, or direct database manipulation in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of form submissions, clicking edit buttons, typing in text areas, and navigating through the Redmine interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'Q1 2025 Goals' milestone originally contained 4 issues: 1 completed ('SSL certificate for api.devlabs.io expires in 14 days') and 3 incomplete ('Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions' assigned to carol.santos, 'Set up Kubernetes cluster for production workloads' assigned to david.kim, and 'Staging database running out of disk space weekly' assigned to david.kim). Total estimated hours: 131. Total spent hours: 29.0. Highest priority incomplete issue: 'Staging database running out of disk space weekly' (Urgent). Highest effort issue: 'Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions' with 16.0 hours spent. The agent must create the 'Q1_2025_Retrospective' wiki page with these details, move the 3 incomplete issues to 'Q2 2025 Goals' with a specific note, close the 'Q1 2025 Goals' version, and add a specific note to the CI/CD issue.
